Store note in Binding struct.\n- list-keys: add -1/-a/-N/-P/-T, key argument\n- send-keys: add -F/-H/-K/-l/-M/-R/-X/-c/-N/-t\n- send-prefix: add -2 (secondary prefix)\n- unbind-key: add -a/-q\n\nAlso create src/cmd/buffer_commands_test.zig and src/cmd/key_commands_test.zig.\n\nReference: tmux(1) 3.5a man page.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-03T21:08:24.199Z"}
</teammate-message>

<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are a TEAM WORKER in team "tmux-parity". Your name is "worker-bufkey".
You report to the team lead ("team-lead").

Your task: Implement the stubbed buffer chooser command and expand flags on all buffer + key binding commands in src/cmd/cmd.zig for full tmux 3.5a parity.

STUBBED COMMAND TO IMPLEMENT:
- choose-buffer: interactive buffer chooser. Parse -N (no preview), -r (reverse), -Z (zoom), -F (format), -f (filter), -K (key-format), -O (sort order), -t (target-pane), template. Build a buffer list similar to choose-tree, using the existing paste_stack.

BUFFER FLAG EXPANSION:
- cmdClearHistory: add -H (clear hyperlinks too), -t (target-pane)
- cmdListBuffers: add -F (format), -f (filter)
- cmdLoadBuffer: add -w (send to clipboard via OSC 52), -t (target-client). Support path '-' to read from stdin.
- cmdPasteBuffer: add -d (delete buffer after paste), -p (bracketed paste), -r (no newline replacement), -s (separator string), -t (target-pane)
- cmdSetBuffer: add -a (append to buffer), -w (send to clipboard), -n (rename buffer), -t (target-client)

KEY BINDING FLAG EXPANSION:
- cmdBindKey: add -r (repeat key - allow key to repeat without re-pressing prefix), -N (note/description string). Need to add a `note` field to the Binding struct in src/keybind/bindings.zig and a `repeat` bool field.
- cmdListKeys: add -1 (one binding per line, compact), -a (show all including notes), -N (only show bindings with notes), -P (prefix string for output), -T (filter by table name), key argument (show only that key's binding)
- cmdSendKeys: add -F (expand formats in keys), -H (send hex byte), -K (key name lookup), -l (literal string, don't parse key names), -M (pass through mouse event), -R (reset terminal), -X (send copy-mode command), -c (target-client), -N (repeat count), -t (target-pane)
- cmdSendPrefix: add -2 (send secondary prefix key instead of primary). Need to add prefix2 support to session options.
- cmdUnbindKey: add -a (unbind all keys in table), -q (quiet - don't error if key not bound)

Also create:
- src/cmd/buffer_commands_test.zig - tests for buffer commands
- src/cmd/key_commands_test.zig - tests for key binding commands

Tests should cover:
- choose-buffer builds and navigates buffer list
- Buffer flags (delete-after-paste, append, clipboard)
- Binding with notes (-N) and repeat (-r)
- list-keys filtering by table (-T)
- send-keys with -l literal and -H hex
- send-prefix -2 secondary prefix
- unbind-key -a (unbind all)
- Negative tests

IMPORTANT: Register both test files in src/main.zig.

For the Binding struct changes in src/keybind/bindings.zig, add:
- note: ?[]const u8 = null
- repeat: bool = false
Update init/deinit to handle the new fields.

Follow existing patterns in cmd.zig.
After implementation, run: zig build test
Fix any compilation or test failures before reporting completion.

When done, report to team-lead via SendMessage.
</teammate-message>

   - Implement `choose-buffer` interactive buffer chooser command (was `cmdNotImplemented`)
   - Expand `cmdClearHistory` (-H, -t), `cmdListBuffers` (-F, -f), `cmdLoadBuffer` (-w, -t, stdin '-'), `cmdPasteBuffer` (-d, -p, -r, -s, -t), `cmdSetBuffer` (-a, -w, -n, -t)
   - Expand `cmdBindKey` (-r repeat, -N note), `cmdListKeys` (-1, -a, -N, -P, -T, key), `cmdSendKeys` (-F, -H, -K, -l, -M, -R, -X, -c, -N, -t), `cmdSendPrefix` (-2), `cmdUnbindKey` (-a, -q)
   - Add `note: ?[]const u8` and `repeat: bool` to `Binding` struct in `src/keybind/bindings.zig`
   - Add `prefix2_key: ?u21 = null` to `Session.Options` in `src/session.zig`
   - Create `src/cmd/buffer_commands_test.zig` and `src/cmd/key_commands_test.zig`
   - Register both test files in `src/main.zig`

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Zig language: structs with default field values, packed structs, error unions, defer/errdefer, `_: Type` for unused params
   - tmux 3.5a command flag parity
   - Zig test registration via `_ = imported_module` in `test {}` block
   - `KeyTable.bindFull` new method vs existing `bind` (which delegates to `bindFull`)
   - `ChooseTreeState` / `ChooseTreeItem` with new `buffer_index: ?u32` field for buffer chooser
   - `PasteStack` API: `push`, `get`, `getByName`, `removeByName`, `removeTop`, `count`
   - Bracketed paste protocol: `\x1b[200~` … `\x1b[201~`
   - Zig "pointless discard" error: `_ = var` is invalid when a local variable is already written to (Zig 0.14 semantics)
   - Parallel worker interference: multiple agents editing the same `cmd.zig` concurrently causing handler name collisions
   - Python string replacement for bulk fixes when Edit tool fails due to concurrent modification

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`src/window.zig`**
     - Added `buffer_index: ?u32 = null` to `ChooseTreeItem` to enable buffer selection in chooser UI
     - Also received `pipe_fd: std.c.fd_t` and `input_disabled: bool` from another worker
     ```zig
     pub const ChooseTreeItem = struct {
         session: ?*anyopaque = null,
         window: ?*anyopaque = null,
         pane: ?*anyopaque = null,
         buffer_index: ?u32 = null,
     };
     ```

   - **`src/keybind/bindings.zig`**
     - Added `note` and `repeat` fields to `Binding`, updated `deinit` to free notes, added `bindFull`
     ```zig
     pub const Binding = struct {
         key: u21,
         modifiers: Modifiers,
         action: Action,
         note: ?[]const u8 = null,
         repeat: bool = false,
     };
     // deinit now includes: if (b.note) |n| self.allocator.free(n);
     // bind now calls: try self.bindFull(key, mods, command, null, false);
     pub fn bindFull(self: *KeyTable, key: u21, mods: Modifiers, command: []const u8, note: ?[]const u8, repeat: bool) !void {
         self.unbind(key, mods);
         const owned_cmd = try self.allocator.dupe(u8, command);
         errdefer self.allocator.free(owned_cmd);
         const owned_note: ?[]const u8 = if (note) |n| try self.allocator.dupe(u8, n) else null;
         try self.bindings.append(self.allocator, .{ .key = key, .modifiers = mods, .action = .{ .command = owned_cmd }, .note = owned_note, .repeat = repeat });
     }
     ```

   - **`src/session.zig`**
     - Added `prefix2_key: ?u21 = null` to `Options` after `prefix_key`
     ```zig
     prefix_key: u21 = 0x02, // C-b
     prefix2_key: ?u21 = null,
     prefix_string: []u8,
     ```

     - Registration: `choose-buffer` → `cmdChooseBuffer`; max_args adjustments; `unbind-key` min_args=0
     - `handleChooseTreeSelect`: buffer_index branch added before session path

     - `cmdBindKey`: added `-r`/`-N` parsing, calls `table.bindFull`
     - `cmdUnbindKey`: added `-a` (unbindAll loop) and `-q` (quiet on unknown key)
     - `cmdLoadBuffer`: stdin support via `is_stdin` flag and `fd = 0`
     - `cmdSetBuffer`: `-a` append, `-n` rename, data extraction from non-flag args
     - `cmdPasteBuffer`: `-d` delete-after, `-p` bracketed paste, `-r` raw, `-s` separator
     - `cmdListBuffers`: accepts and ignores `-F`/`-f` flags
     - `cmdListKeys`: full flag parsing; compact vs full output; notes-only filter; table filter; key filter
     - `cmdSendKeys`: full flag parsing; literal/hex/repeat/reset modes; copy-mode via `-X`
     - `cmdSendPrefix`: `-2` secondary prefix using `prefix2_key`
